faq.title: Frequently asked questions about pricing
faq.desc: More questions? Our team responds within 24 hours.

items.q: How much does the Gastro Master POS system cost?
items.a: The [Gastro Master POS system](/produkte/kassensystem) starts at €69 per month (net). The cloud POS software has a 3-month cancellation period. It runs on Windows computers and includes TSE certification (§146a AO), GoBD compliance and personal support via WhatsApp.

Setup costs are discussed individually in a personal consultation — depending on the size of your business. The website has a minimum contract term of 12 months. Online shop, app and POS can be cancelled monthly with a 3-month notice period. No commission, no surprises.

items.q: What is the difference between website and ordering system?
items.a: The website (from €49/month) is a professional restaurant website without ordering functionality — your digital storefront for Google and new customers. The ordering system (from €79/month) additionally includes the [online ordering shop with 0% commission](/produkte/webshop), where your customers can order directly.

items.q: Can I operate multiple locations with one plan?
items.a: Yes. The plans support multiple locations and branches. The POS system includes up to 4 registers per license — at no extra cost. For franchise systems with many locations we develop custom solutions.

Gastro Master charges 0% commission. Payment providers (Stripe, PayPal, Klarna etc.) charge their own transaction fees. With the optional transaction surcharge you can pass these transparently and legally to your customers — so you bear no cost.

items.q: Which plan is right for my business?
items.a: For a pure online presence the website (from €49/month) is ideal. If you want to accept online orders, the ordering system (from €79/month) is the right choice. For your [own ordering app](/produkte/app) we recommend app + ordering system from €149/month. The POS system (from €69/month) complements all plans for on-site operations. If you want to [start your own delivery service](/loesungen/lieferservice-gruenden), our guide covers all the steps. In a free consultation we find the right combination together.

cta.title: Not sure which plan fits?
cta.desc: In a 20-minute call we show you the best combination for your business — free, no obligation and tailored to you.
